title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.590 - Matching funds — source
text:
226.590.  Matching funds — source. — The state highways and transportation commission is authorized to use any funds, appropriated to it or received by it from other than the state road fund for matching federal funds or for other lawful purposes of sections 226.500 to 226.600.
(L. 1965 2d Ex. Sess. p. 900 § 10)
